name: Adventurer
description: A forgiving jack-of-all-trades for new players. Adventurers mix a warrior's bash with a self-heal, so they can both fight and patch themselves up while learning the ropes, and at level 15 learn overpower, a heavy driving blow, then at level 30 a disarming strike that fouls a foe's grip and weakens their attacks, and at level 45 brace, a reactive defensive stance that raises their guard to weather a heavy assault.
